query: SELECT cp.brandId, b.name, cp.status, COUNT(*) as count FROM content_packages cp LEFT JOIN brands b ON b.id = cp.brandId GROUP BY cp.brandId, b.name, cp.status ORDER BY cp.brandId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3X7ymVRNW2gRHR2.root --database AU2Bbcsi9Q6EAtrWDQRvTo --execute SELECT cp.brandId, b.name, cp.status, COUNT(*) as count FROM content_packages cp LEFT JOIN brands b ON b.id = cp.brandId GROUP BY cp.brandId, b.name, cp.status ORDER BY cp.brandId;
